questions.q: Which car rental company recently dropped an almost $10,000 claim against a B.C. couple over alleged diesel damage after evidence showed they pumped regular gasoline?
Which Canadian astronaut was praised for speaking French during the Artemis II mission, helping heal tensions following a recent national language row?
Which former federal environment minister recently blasted the heads of Canadian oil companies, accusing them of "taking us for fools" over rising emissions?
In a direct address to the nation, Prime Minister Mark Carney declared that Canada's close economic ties with which country have now become a "weakness" that must be corrected?
Parents in which province recently sounded the alarm that high rates of bullying are forcing them to keep their children out of school, leading to severe absenteeism?
